meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Defending Reddit at Scale - Pratik Lotia & Spencer Koch
meta.description: Join us to explore Reddit's defense strategy to handle massive traffic and sophisticated abuse. We'll delve into how Reddit tackles this challenge, from traffic analysis to innovative resiliency techniques, all while understanding why a tailored, in-house approach is vital for such a high-scale platform.
